techs.name: Crop Rotation
techs.desc: Systematic field rotation restores soil nutrients. Farm yield +15%.

techs.name: Milling
techs.desc: Waterwheel-driven millstones grind grain into flour for richer bread. Unlocks Mill.

techs.name: Animal Husbandry
techs.desc: Domesticating livestock provides meat, dairy, and draught power. Unlocks Animal Pen, pasture zones.

techs.name: Fermentation
techs.desc: Grain fermented into ale lifts settler morale. Unlocks Brewery.

techs.name: Food Preservation
techs.desc: Salting and smoking turn surplus meals into shelf-stable rations that never spoil — the strategic winter reserve. Cooks preserve food when the larder overflows.

techs.name: Horticulture
techs.desc: Kitchen gardens cultivate vegetables for dietary variety. Unlocks Kitchen Garden.

techs.name: Textile Farming
techs.desc: Flax cultivation provides fibre for rope and cloth. Unlocks flax zones.

techs.name: Carpentry
techs.desc: Precision joinery and woodworking tools. Unlocks Sawmill for timber production.

techs.name: Prospecting
techs.desc: Geological surveys reveal clay and mineral deposits. Unlocks mine zones and clay.

techs.name: Brickwork
techs.desc: Clay baked into brick enables durable masonry. Unlocks Kiln.

techs.name: Blacksmithing
techs.desc: Iron tools accelerate construction and crafting. Unlocks Blacksmith, tools resource.

techs.name: Iron Mining
techs.desc: Deep shaft mining extracts iron ore and coal seams. Unlocks Mine building.

techs.name: Iron Smelting
techs.desc: Smelting ore into wrought iron enables advanced tools and forged weapons.

techs.name: Stone Masonry
techs.desc: Dressed-stone construction unlocks sturdier homes and cheaper stone buildings.

techs.name: Fortification
techs.desc: Military engineering: stone wall upgrades, Watchtower for early raid warning.

techs.name: Herbalism
techs.desc: Medicinal plant knowledge. Unlocks Herb Garden for cultivating healing herbs.

techs.name: First Aid
techs.desc: Wound treatment protocols cut infection risk. Unlocks Well for cleaner water.

techs.name: Germ Theory
techs.desc: Understanding disease transmission transforms healing. Unlocks Apothecary, medicine.

techs.name: Trade Organization
techs.desc: Systematised ledgers and routes. Enables market standing orders and custom quantities.

techs.name: Commerce
techs.desc: Organised warehousing and trade flows. Unlocks Warehouse for configurable bulk storage.

techs.name: Banking
techs.desc: Financial instruments enable dynamic market pricing and credit lines.

techs.name: Militia Training
techs.desc: Organised drills and arms practice. Unlocks Barracks for passive combat training.

techs.name: Repeating Arms
techs.desc: Rifled and repeating weapons. Forged weapon damage +15.

techs.name: Literacy
techs.desc: Reading and writing raises settler potential. All skill caps +1.

techs.name: Schooling
techs.desc: Formal education accelerates skill growth. Unlocks Schoolhouse.
